prayoga.literature_text: ekaM sAMKyaM ca yogaM ca yaH paSyati sa paSyati
mama paSyanti ye nATaM rAmaM rAjIvalocanam
vasuDA sarvA na tu paSyAmi jAnakIm
AKyAtA gfDrarAjena na ca paSyAmi tAm
neha paSyAmi loke'nyaM yo me pratibalaH
yA tvAM na paSyAmi kfSA vivarRA
CAyA me nigfhItA ca na ca paSyAmi kiMcana
virADaM rAkzasaM hatvA SaraBaNgaM dadarSa ha
sa nagAgre ca tAM laNkAM dadarSa
caran SrImAn dadarSa ca nananda ca
dadarSa sumahAtejAH na dadarSa ca jAnakIm
na hi drakzyAmi yadi tAM laNkAyAm
paSya me pArTa rUpARi SataSo'Ta sahasraSaH
na ca matsTAni BUtAni paSya me yogamESvaram
vatsa rAma DanuH paSya iti rAGavamabravIt
sOmitriM mAM ca rAmaM ca vyasanEH paSya mohitAn
karmaRyakarma yaH paSyedakarmaRi ca karma yaH
